CARON_DEAD.title: Slayer of the Void
CARON_DEAD.description: Took the life of Caron, the guide of the sub-space.

CARON_PARTNER.title: Caron's Compact
CARON_PARTNER.description: Entered into a binding contract with Caron.

LEGENDARY_RAISER.title: Miraculous Resurrection
LEGENDARY_RAISER.description: Raised a skeleton of Legendary rarity.

RESISTANCE_HERO.title: Vanguard of Liberation
RESISTANCE_HERO.description: Reached 200 contribution points with the Resistance.

ENDING_0.title: Nirvana
ENDING_0.description: Severed all causal chains and attained eternal tranquility.

ENDING_1.title: Revolution
ENDING_1.description: Ended the Reaper's reign and brought a new light to the Terminal.

ENDING_2.title: Collapse
ENDING_2.description: Vanished into a vortex of extinction where neither order nor destruction matters.

ENDING_3.title: Hound of Death
ENDING_3.description: Forsook your soul to be preserved as the Reaper's eternal servant.

ENDING_4.title: Tyranny
ENDING_4.description: Usurped the Reaper and became the new master of dread.

ENDING_5.title: The New Order
ENDING_5.description: Chose the cold, precise gears of rule over the chaos.

ENDING_6.title: Bystander
ENDING_6.description: Chose to simply watch until the very end as the world crumbled.
